creator: michipili@gmail.com
text:
That is strange, I submitted ports/189176 over the www interface but
only got a denial from the CGI script. It seems that, for some reason,
it went through anyway.

If I remember correctly:

1. I solved incorrectly the ânot a robotâ-puzzle (capitalisation mismatch).
2. I posted, saw the denial message and went back to the submit-PR page.
3. I fixed the puzzle.
4. I posted, saw the same denial message again and went back to the
submit-PR page.
5. I reloaded the page to get a new puzzle which I solved correctly
6. I posted.

While I have seen two denials and one approval, this resulted in two PRs
open. It looks like my POST in step 4 went through even if the system
displayed the same denial message as in step 2.

Best regards,
Michael
